servinfo.title: Procedure after ECM Replacement

attention3.ptxt: When ECM and keyless start control module (keyless push start model) or BCM (Ignition switch model) are replaced with new ones at the same time, perform “Immobilizer Key Registration” instead of “ECM Registration” using SUZUKI scan tool and immobilizer cable. Refer to “SUZUKI SDT Immobilizer Control System Operator's Manual” for the immobilizer registration.

servinfo.ptxt: After ECM is replaced with new one, perform the following procedure:

s1.ptxt: Download calibration data from SDT to ECM. Refer to “Suzuki ECU Programming System Operator's Manual”.
Perform electric throttle control system calibration.
